label: Scenario part (pawn modifier)
description: Abstract base for scenario parts that apply modifications or filters to pawns during generation. Adds chance, context, and hideOffMap fields to the base ScenPart.

chance.label: Chance
chance.description: Probability (0-1) that this modifier is applied to each eligible pawn. Defaults to 1.

context.label: Context
context.description: Which pawns this modifier targets during generation.

hideOffMap.label: Hide off map
hideOffMap.description: When true, this modifier is not shown in the starting pawn configuration UI. Defaults to false.
